---
title: "CH modelling"
subtitle: "University Münster • Remote Sensing"
author: "Emilio Sánchez"
date: today
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: simple
    slide-number: true
    progress: true
    css: slide.css
    footer: ""
    transition: fade
    background-transition: fade
    title-slide-attributes:
      data-background-image: "../content/gchm/clean_lines.png"
      data-background-size: cover
execute:
  echo: false
bibliography: ../content/gchm/references.bib
# csl: ecological-applications.csl
---


## Research Question

**Are spectral reflectance values the driving force in recent deep learning models predicting canopy height?**



---

## Sample Tiles
![](../content/gchm/map_tiles.png)


---

## Model training

::: columns
::: column
![GEDI reference data](../content/gchm/gedi.png)
:::
::: column
- Location description
- Key variables
- Data sources
:::
:::



---

## Results

![Canopy Height distribution](../content/gchm/CH_RIdge_Tile.png)
Some key finding here [@lang_gchm_2023].

::: {.footer}
::: {.smaller}
::: {#refs}
:::
:::
:::

---



## Thank You

Questions?
